mapper.sql: ModelNo, CustomerNo, QtyBin, ClassCode, CaseType, ProdType, LogInDate, BinCell, UpdDate, StockCode, PositionNo, MeshType, InCaseQty, Adjustable, Remark, QtyOrdpoint, ProdSeri
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._BinData_sh
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._BinData_sh (ModelNo, CustomerNo, QtyBin, ClassCode, CaseType, ProdType, LogInDate, BinCell, UpdDate, StockCode, PositionNo, MeshType, InCaseQty, Adjustable, Remark, QtyOrdpoint, ProdSeri) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{classcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{positionno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{meshtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{incaseqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adjustable,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyordpoint,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

ModelNo,
CustomerNo,
QtyBin,

CaseType,

LogInDate,
BinCell,
UpdDate,
StockCode,
PositionNo,

mapper.update:
update dbo._BinData_sh
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
QtyBin = #{record.qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ClassCode = #{record.classcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
CaseType = #{record.casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProdType = #{record.prodtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LogInDate = #{record.logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BinCell = #{record.bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER},
UpdDate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
PositionNo = #{record.positionno,jdbcType=CHAR},
MeshType = #{record.meshtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InCaseQty = #{record.incaseqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Adjustable = #{record.adjustable,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOrdpoint = #{record.qtyordpoint,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ProdSeri = #{record.prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo._BinData_sh set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, QtyBin = #{record.qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ClassCode = #{record.classcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, CaseType = #{record.casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProdType = #{record.prodtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LogInDate = #{record.logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, BinCell = #{record.bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER}, UpdDate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, PositionNo = #{record.positionno,jdbcType=CHAR}, MeshType = #{record.meshtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InCaseQty = #{record.incaseqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Adjustable = #{record.adjustable,jdbcType=CHAR}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QtyOrdpoint = #{record.qtyordpoint,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ProdSeri = #{record.prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo._BinData_sh
QtyBin = #{qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ClassCode = #{classcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
CaseType = #{casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProdType = #{prodtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LogInDate = #{logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BinCell = #{bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER},
UpdDate = #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
PositionNo = #{positionno,jdbcType=CHAR},
MeshType = #{meshtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InCaseQty = #{incaseqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Adjustable = #{adjustable,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOrdpoint = #{qtyordpoint,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ProdSeri = #{prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}

update dbo._BinData_sh set QtyBin = #{qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ClassCode = #{classcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, CaseType = #{casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProdType = #{prodtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LogInDate = #{logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, BinCell = #{bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER}, UpdDate = #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, PositionNo = #{positionno,jdbcType=CHAR}, MeshType = #{meshtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InCaseQty = #{incaseqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Adjustable = #{adjustable,jdbcType=CHAR}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QtyOrdpoint = #{qtyordpoint,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ProdSeri = #{prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}
